raw.objective: “Routine clinical pharmacokinetic data collected from out-patients who received phenytoin were analysed to estimate population pharmacokinetic parameters”
raw.covariates: Tested: WT on Vm; AGE on Km; formulation on bioavailability F Included: WT on Vm; AGE on Km; formulation on bioavailability F
raw.observations: Bioavailability of PHT in powder form is roughly 10% less than a tablet. Apart from the impact of weight, children younger than 15 years typically have a 16% lower elimination.
raw.equations: Vm=theta1*((WT/60)**theta3)*exp(eta2) Km=theta2*(theta4**AGE)*exp(eta1) F=1-BA*theta5 DD=((Vm*Css)/(F*(Km+Css)))*exp(eps1) AGE is age (under 15 years=0; above=1) BA is formulation (0=tablet; 1=powder)
raw.parameter_values: theta1=369 theta2=3.67 theta3=0.55 theta4=0.84 theta5=0.895 omega1=0.0340 omega2=0.285 sigma1=0.0129

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: Vm=theta1*((WT/60)**theta3)*exp(eta2) Km=theta2*(theta4**AGE)*exp(eta1) F=1-BA*theta5 DD=((Vm*Css)/(F*(Km+Css)))*exp(eps1) AGE is age (under 15 years=0; above=1) BA is formulation (0=tablet; 1=powder)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “Routine clinical pharmacokinetic data collected from out-patients who received phenytoin were analysed to estimate population pharmacokinetic parameters”

covariates.raw: Tested: WT on Vm; AGE on Km; formulation on bioavailability F Included: WT on Vm; AGE on Km; formulation on bioavailability F

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
